title: camissonia campestris subsp. campestris
intro: Camissonia campestris subsp. campestris, also known as the desert gold, is a plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Camissonia campestris subsp. campestris include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and alternative medicine.
